title: FantasyRPG
description: A fantasy modpack with custom origins and a heavy focus on atmospherics and fine tuned configs.
body:
A delightful cottagecore light fantasy with different classes and races to choose from and a heavy focus on atmosphere.

# Classes
When you load up the world you can pick from:
- Archer
- Wizard
- Cryomancer
- Pyromancer
- Rogue
- Warrior
- Bloodmage
- Frostknight
- Plaguebringer
- Priest
- Paladin

# Cohesion
A heavy focus on polish, no redundant features, and configured to feel like a complete game, rather than a modpack with incohesive game design.

# Cottagecore
- A large amount of cottagecore features, like brewing, farming, building.
